content.text: Answer four problems. Write your answers clearly in complete English sentences. You may quote results (within reason) as long as you state them clearly.

subparts.label: (i)
subparts.text: If \(H \subseteq G\) is a normal subgroup and \(K\) is a characteristic subgroup of \(H\), show that \(K\) is normal in \(G\).

subparts.label: (ii)
subparts.text: Give an example of a group and subgroups \(K \subseteq H \subseteq G\) with \(H\) normal in \(G\), \(K\) normal in \(H\) but not normal in \(G\).

subparts.label: (i)
subparts.text: Show that if \(G\) is abelian, the subset \(H\) of elements of finite order is a subgroup.

subparts.label: (ii)
subparts.text: Give an example of a (nonabelian) group \(G\) and elements \(x, y \in G\) such that \(xy\) has infinite order.

problem.text: Show that a group of order \(3^2 \cdot 17\) is abelian.

subparts.label: (i)
subparts.text: Define what it means for a group \(G\) to be nilpotent.

subparts.label: (ii)
subparts.text: Show that any nilpotent group is solvable.

subparts.label: (iii)
subparts.text: Give an example of a finite solvable group that is not nilpotent.

problem.text: Let \(G\) be a group acting on a set \(S\), and \(H \subseteq G\) a normal subgroup. Assume that for any \(x_1, x_2 \in S\) there is a unique \(h \in H\) such that \(h(x_1)=x_2\). For \(x \in S\) let \(G_x\) be the stabilizer of \(x\). Show that for any \(x \in S\), \(G\) is a semi-direct product of \(G_x\) and \(H\).
Show that for any \(n \geq 5\), \(A_n\) is the only nontrivial proper normal subgroup of \(S_n\).
Show that the normalizer of a 5-Sylow subgroup of \(A_5\) has order 10, and is a maximal subgroup of \(A_5\).
